title: draba elata
intro: Draba elata, also known as Alpine Whitlow Grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Draba elata include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and soothe sore throats. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
